target.title: test(infra): use bonjour beacon type in discovery test
target.body:
## Summary
- replace the loose `BeaconRecord` test shape with the exported `GatewayBonjourBeacon` contract
- keep the invalid-port regression assertion while making the test pass the production helper a production-typed beacon

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/infra/bonjour-discovery.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/infra/bonjour-discovery.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/infra/bonjour-discovery.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
- AWS Crabbox `corepack pnpm check:changed`: run `run_1af313cdd0bb`, lease `cbx_f0ef52388e7c`, provider `aws`, exit 0

## Notes
- Blacksmith Testbox proof was attempted first, but this machine is not authenticated with Blacksmith (`blacksmith auth login` required), so the broad gate used direct AWS Crabbox instead.
